Tuna Town Logistics — Kii-Katsuura

Monday – Tuesday, May 25–26, 2026  •  Kamenoi Hotel → Hotel Manseiro → Hotel Trusty Osaka Abeno
Bag Strategy — Before You Leave Kamenoi
Luggage
Bag Split at Kamenoi Hotel Drop checked bags before auction — overnight bags travel with you
Bag Set Movement Deadline
2 checked bags Kamenoi → Hotel Trusty Osaka Abeno (Takkyubin forwarding) 9:00 AM, May 25
Overnight bags (2) Travel with you: Kamenoi → Hotel Manseiro → Kii-Katsuura Station No deadline
🕑 Hard Deadline
Drop Checked Bags: 9:00 AM Auction Departs: 6:50 AM → Return to Kamenoi after auction to drop bags before 9:00 AM
📦 Takkyubin Details
Drop 2 bags at Kamenoi front desk by 9:00 AM on Monday, May 25. Bags forwarded directly to Hotel Trusty Osaka Abeno, Tennoji — expected arrival ~6:00 PM on May 26. Cash only (~¥2,510/bag).
Monday, May 25 — Tuna Town Day
Tour
6:50 AM — Tuna Auction Tour Nigiwai Market or Katsuura Port Entrance
🕑 Timing
Arrive by: 6:50 AM Tour: 7:00 AM – 8:00 AM Duration: ~1 hour

Katsuura Port fish market (Nigiwai Market area) — Public Domain · 玄史生

🏝 Meeting Point — Nigiwai Market or port entrance. Arrive by 6:50 AM — the auction floor can empty quickly once bidding ends.

👀 Viewing Area — Dedicated observation deck on the 2nd floor, away from active wholesalers.

🎢 Focus — Auction floor, bidding process, and tuna quality grading.
📅 Market Closure Dates Generally closed Saturdays and Tuesdays, and before/after major public holidays. May 25 (Monday) is open.
Walk
~8:00–9:00 AM — Return to Kamenoi for Breakfast Enjoy breakfast before departing for the day

Return to Kamenoi from the auction and enjoy breakfast at the hotel before departing for the day.

Explore
Morning / Early Afternoon — Ad Hoc Touring, Kii-Katsuura Katsuura Port area, local shops, town

Explore at leisure. The Katsuura Port area, local shops along the harbor, and the town center are all within easy walking distance of the hotel. No fixed schedule — return in time for the afternoon onsen excursion.

Pilgrim
Morning/Afternoon — Dual Pilgrimage Certificate Visitor Center near Kii-Katsuura Station

Kumano Kodo Visitor Center — Kii-Katsuura, next to the station

🏭 Where to Go Visit the Visitor Center (Tourism Bureau) near Kii-Katsuura Station. No need to stop at Kii-Tanabe — the Kuroshio passes through without requiring a transfer.

Cost: ~¥1,000 (2 people)

Check-in
Afternoon — Hotel Manseiro Check-in Drop overnight bags • Collect Urashima cave bath pass before heading out

Hotel Manseiro (万清楼) — Kii-Katsuura, Wakayama

🕐 Check-in from 3:00 PM — Overnight stay, May 25.
🆎 Kaiseki dinner: ~6:00–6:30 PM — plan to return from cave baths before then.
  • 1
    Check in & drop overnight bags in your room
    Checked bags are already en route to Hotel Trusty Osaka via Takkyubin. Overnight bags stay here at Manseiro.
  • 2
    Get the Urashima Cave Bath Pass from the front desk
    Ask for the pass/ticket granting access to Hotel Urashima cave baths without the standard day-use fee (~¥1,500 savings per person). Collect this before heading to the pier.
Onsen
Afternoon — Cave Baths at Hotel Urashima Allow 2–2.5 hours • Return by ~6:00 PM for kaiseki dinner
🕑 Timing
Excursion: ~2–2.5 hours Return to Manseiro by: ~6:00 PM Kaiseki dinner: ~6:00–6:30 PM

Katsuura Tourist Pier — board the Urashima Maru turtle shuttle here · Public Domain · 玄史生

⏱ Bath Hours — 5:00 AM – 11:00 PM  •  Closed for cleaning: 10:00 AM – 1:00 PM
🧲 What to Bring — Use towels from your Manseiro room. Hotel Urashima may charge for rentals.
  • 1
    Turtle Boat Shuttle — Urashima Maru
    Walk to Katsuura Tourist Pier (3–5 min from Manseiro). Board the “Urashima Maru” shuttle (shaped like a giant turtle) — free, ~5 min ride across the bay.
  • 2
    Navigate Hotel Urashima
    Follow the color-coded floor lines:
    • Bokido (blue/green) — largest cave bath, Pacific Ocean view
    • Genbudo — smaller cave bath
Hotel
Evening — Hotel Manseiro Overnight stay with overnight bags
🆎 Kaiseki Dinner — ~6:00–6:30 PM
🛏 Overnight — Overnight bags stay here. Checked bags already en route to Hotel Trusty via Takkyubin.
Tuesday, May 26 — Departure Day
Optional
~5:00 AM — Sunrise Cave Bath at Hotel Urashima Bokido cave bath • Pacific Ocean sunrise • Manseiro pass still valid
🌅 Optional — only if you’re up for an early start. The Bokido cave bath faces the Pacific — watching sunrise through the cave opening from the water is the signature Urashima experience. Sunrise is ~5:07 AM on May 26.
🕑 Timing
Baths open: 5:00 AM Sunrise: ~5:07 AM Return to Manseiro: by 7:00–7:30 AM
🎫 Manseiro Pass — Your pass from Monday check-in covers this visit. No additional fee.
🧲 Bokido (blue/green floor line) — largest cave bath, Pacific-facing opening. Arrive just before 5:07 AM to be in the water at sunrise.
  • 1
    Confirm first Urashima Maru shuttle time with Manseiro front desk the evening before
    The shuttle runs early but verify the first departure — typically from 5:00 AM. Walk to Katsuura Tourist Pier (~3–5 min).
  • 2
    Head straight to Bokido
    Follow the blue/green floor line. Allow a few minutes to settle in before sunrise at 5:07 AM.
  • 3
    Return to Manseiro by 7:00–7:30 AM for breakfast
    Plenty of time before the 11:49 AM train departure.
Morning
Leisurely Breakfast at Manseiro No hard departure time — train departs 11:49 AM

Enjoy a relaxed breakfast. Plenty of time before the 11:49 AM train. Plan to leave Manseiro by ~10:30 AM to allow time for the Tourism Bureau and station ekiben.

Ekiben
At the Station — Ekiben Pick-Up Kii-Katsuura Station platform shop — limited quantities
🍱 Kumano Gyubento (Kumano Wagyu beef bento) — a Wakayama regional specialty available only at Kii-Katsuura Station. Buy early; limited stock. The perfect lunch on the Kuroshio.

Cost: ~¥2,000–¥3,000 (2 people)

Train
11:49 AM — JR Kuroshio #22 Kii-Katsuura → Tennoji  •  Arrives 3:33 PM
🕑 Timing
Departs: 11:49 AM Arrives Tennoji: 3:33 PM Journey: ~3h 44m
⚠ Do NOT Tap Suica for Kuroshio Book reserved seats separately — do not tap IC card to board. The Kuroshio is a limited express requiring a separate reserved seat ticket.

Kii-Katsuura Station (紀伊勝浦駅) — CC BY-SA 3.0 Kouchiumi

TrainJR Kuroshio #22
Departs11:49 AM — Kii-Katsuura
Arrives3:33 PM — Tennoji
BagsHands-free — already en route via Takkyubin, arrive Hotel Trusty ~6:00 PM
Est. Cost¥13,000+ (pre-paid, reserved seats)
Check-in
3:33 PM — Hotel Trusty Osaka Abeno Tennoji, Osaka  •  Check-in from 3:00 PM

Abeno nini complex — Hotel Trusty Osaka Abeno occupies the mid-level floors · CC BY-SA 4.0 J o

🕐 Check-in: Tuesday, May 26 from 3:00 PM  •  Check-out: Thursday, May 28 at 11:00 AM
🏠 2 nights  ·  2 adults  ·  1 room
📦 Bags arriving via Takkyubin — expected by ~6:00 PM
🚌 JR Tennoji Station → Hotel Trusty Osaka Abeno
  • Exit JR Tennoji Station via the Abeno / south exit (follow signs for Abeno Harukas)
  • Walk south along Abenosuji — Abeno Harukas (the tall tower) will be on your right
  • Continue south ~400 m — Hotel Trusty Osaka Abeno is on the left side of Abenosuji, just past the Abeno shopping area
📱 Navigation Search “Hotel Trusty Osaka Abeno” or “ホテルトラスティ大阪阿倍野” in Google Maps / Apple Maps — ~5–7 min walk from the JR Tennoji south exit.
  • 1
    Confirm Takkyubin bags arrived
    Check with front desk — expected by ~6:00 PM. If delayed, ask staff to call the Yamato Transport tracking number.
  • 2
    Request hotel laundry service
    Wash and repack after the Kumano Kodo trek. Ask at front desk — same-day or overnight laundry typically available.
